query: soft focus dreamy hazy out of focus portrait
message: sub:intentional_blur/soft_focus — anti_aesthetic — dreamy hazy out-of-focus portraits, vaseline lens, soft veil

response.objective_caption: A person with shoulder-length brown hair viewed in profile, facing right, seen through a pale blue hazy or misty medium. The individual appears to be wearing a dark zippered jacket. Soft circular light spots are scattered throughout the frame, and a bright circular reflection sits near the eye area. The background is indistinct, with a cool pale blue tone dominating the scene. The person's hands are partially visible at the lower edge of the frame.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A person with shoulder-length brown hair viewed in profile, facing right, seen through a deliberate soft blue haze that blurs and obscures the entire scene with intentional blur, flattening depth and dimension into a misty, almost dreamlike surface. The pale blue wash crushes tonal separation, creating an oppressive, melancholic atmosphere tinged with unease. Soft circular bokeh spots scatter across the frame, and a bright circular reflection sits near the eye like an detached highlight. The individual wears a dark zippered jacket with hands partially visible at the bottom, swallowed by the hazy, suffocating cool-toned environment that withholds clarity and evokes isolation.
